features.title: 指定目录一键同步到 Git 仓库
features.summary: 用户选择一个本地目录，配置远程 Git 仓库和认证信息，点击同步后将目录内容提交并推送到远程仓库。
scope: 输入远程 Git 仓库 URL
输入认证 token 或等价凭据
显示同步中、成功或失败状态

acceptance.ios: PASS: fvm dart run tool/harness.dart spec accept directory-git-sync --maestro --platform ios
acceptance.android: PASS: fvm dart run tool/harness.dart spec accept directory-git-sync --maestro --platform android

features.next_step: Feature complete. Dual-platform Maestro acceptance passes on both iOS and Android. No further action required.
